admin.title: Employee balances
admin.subtitle: Remaining holiday and leave hours for each employee. Anyone without an assigned quota still appears, with no values (—).
admin.note: Remaining = opening balance + accrued − used (approved). Pending requests are not deducted right away: remaining with pending shows what would be left if they were all approved, and it can go negative.

mine.title: My balances
mine.subtitle: Remaining holiday and leave hours available to you.
mine.empty: No holiday or leave quota assigned. Please contact your administrator.
